{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603231854459840CF370948FEE4DE45\"}"},"total":18646},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6990505556507902756","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书已经追了两三年了从地球追到山海又从山海追到三千大界，我可以非常确定的说这本书是我看过的最好看的玄幻小说了，没有之一，希望作者可以继续认真写下去，莫因为外界的原因而损耗了本书的价值，坐等邪帝一统大界整合为逍遥界，作者加油！","text_exts":[{"e":54,"s":50,"text":"玄幻小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E7%8E%84%E5%B9%BB%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774263285FEE4DE45%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%226990505556507902756%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226645495887244037134%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%8E%84%E5%B9%BB%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1627603914,"group_id":"6645495887244037134","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"菩提潜移本无罪，落叶归根卧华尘","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1pscOsd0XdFLvckf2LyMgJLPJ4lJ26eF5WFwFzNREUS","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c855936b69234e02941242b1fbf562b3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776791000\u0026x-signature=vG9LKJNGS9schrRYvQr3a80Mv%2Fc%3D","user_id":"3976297296181895","user_name":"东海叶皇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3976297296181895","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"b
